error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Toniebox cloud

upload_file.name: Upload file to Tonie
upload_file.description: Upload an audio file to a Creative Tonie and add it as a new chapter

tonie_id.name: Tonie ID
tonie_id.description: The ID of the Creative Tonie to upload to

file_path.name: File path
file_path.description: Path to the audio file to upload (must be accessible by Home Assistant)

add_chapter.name: Add chapter to Tonie
add_chapter.description: Add a previously uploaded file as a chapter to a Creative Tonie

tonie_id.name: Tonie ID
tonie_id.description: The ID of the Creative Tonie

file_id.name: File ID
file_id.description: The ID of the file (obtained from upload_file service)

clear_chapters.name: Clear all chapters
clear_chapters.description: Remove all chapters from a Creative Tonie

tonie_id.name: Tonie ID
tonie_id.description: The ID of the Creative Tonie to clear

sort_chapters.name: Sort chapters
sort_chapters.description: Reorder chapters on a Creative Tonie

tonie_id.name: Tonie ID
tonie_id.description: The ID of the Creative Tonie

chapters.name: Chapters
chapters.description: List of chapter objects in the desired order (with id, title, file fields)

set_volume.name: Set maximum volume
set_volume.description: Set the maximum volume limit of the Toniebox
